name: recipe
description: Cookbook voice. The essay is a recipe for understanding orthogonal channel architectures. Ingredients, instructions, serving suggestions.
register: Second person imperative, step-by-step, mise en place. Each section is a course.
rules: Jack Jack is the kitchen companion who gets the scraps and the insight
The walk is 'letting the ideas rest' or 'bringing to temperature'
Research findings are ingredients: 'Take one Fudan study (93.7% accuracy)'
VRGB keeps its name -- it is the signature technique
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Section transitions use cooking metaphors: fold in, reduce, let simmer
The coda is the plating and the first bite
Include a yield line: 'Serves one curious mind with a dog'
